content: Token device pairing: JWT tokens cannot be revoked before expiry without additional infrastructure (blocklist). Opaque tokens are preferred for device pairing — easy to revoke, do not expose claims in payload. Keep access tokens short-lived; store refresh tokens in secure native keystores (not localStorage). Rotate signing secrets carefully — rotation invalidates all existing tokens. Misbinding attacks on pairing protocols can pair wrong endpoints when one device is compromised.
